name: Chilli Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter or ghee in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add cinnamon, cardamon, pepper, and cloves. Cook for 3-5 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
3. Add garlic and ginger. Cook for an additional 5-8 minutes, stirring frequently until fragrant.
4. Toss the chicken pieces into the pan and cook for about 5 minutes, ensuring they are evenly coated with the spices.
5. Stir in chilli powder, yoghurt, salt, and saffron. Mix well to combine.
6. Simmer the mixture for 10-15 minutes until the chicken is cooked through and tender.
7. Stir in coconut cream and slivered roasted almonds. Cook for another 5 minutes to allow the sauce to reduce slightly.
8. Remove from heat and serve hot with your choice of side dish.
